user.title: Mopeka Tank Sensor
user.description: Configure a Mopeka BLE tank sensor.

confirm.title: Confirm Mopeka device
confirm.description: Set options for discovered Mopeka sensor.

custom_dimensions.title: Custom tank dimensions
custom_dimensions.description:
Enter the usable height for '{tank_type}'.

For vertical cylinders: distance from sensor zero to the maximum fill level (mm).
For horizontal cylinders: tank interior diameter (mm).
For rectangular tanks: tank interior depth (mm).

abort.not_supported: Device is not a Mopeka sensor.
